calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-01-2003 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by plaintiff in pro per Julio Diaz. Based upon request of plaintiff in pro per and based upon the withdrawal of plaintiffs' attorney, it is deemed that the other plaintiffs' in pro per have abandoned this case. The court having reviewed the file, finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiffs' in pro per's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed without prejudice. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by Beldon Yee, CSR #2647. (212)
